turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, mujhe apni medicines ka refill chahiye tha. Main Dr. Sinha ka patient hoon.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji zaroor. Aapka naam aur registered mobile number bata sakte hain?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Mr. Tiwari. Main aapka record dekh raha hoon... Dr. Sinha ne last month Metformin aur Atorvastatin prescribe ki thi. Kya inhi ka refill chahiye?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan haan, yehi dono. Kab mil sakti hain?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Main Dr. Sinha ke paas refill request bhej deta hoon. Approval ke baad hum aapko call karenge — usually 24 ghante mein hota hai. Pharmacy se aap directly le sakte hain ya home delivery bhi available hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Achha theek hai. Home delivery prefer karunga.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Note kar liya. Confirmation SMS aayegi jab prescription ready hogi. Koi aur help chahiye?
